creator: gja822@narod.ru
text:
(In reply to Christos Margiolis from comment #7)
No, this sysctl didn't change anything with my recording problem. Luckily playback is O.K. or I had to use some external soundcard. But the recording is unusable.

By the way, I've discovered that setting igain=1 in mixer makes sound from my microphone to go directly to my speakers (with addition on noise). Without any recording software. I'm unsure this should be intended behaviour.

Here's the sample of that awful sound
http://94.180.119.80/Microphone20241212.wav
